I think that the question of whether or net we are going to constitutionalize pretrial discovery if this Court adopts the balancing test we are advocating, 9ivE justifications for thesE restraints on speech, ls a question that was really decided by thE fra11ers of our Constitution and the drafters cf the First Amendment . In Smith v. Daily !!Hail for violatln9 a state statute and publishin9 the nares of min or offenders. There are a whole ran9e of cases in which these issues havE come ur;: .
